other_observers: Scott Rashid, Judy Wright, Robert Quist, Sue Riffe, Connie Kogler, Larry Semo, et al; Scott Rashid
specific_location: Sylvan Dale Guest Ranch, about 5 miles west of Loveland on US 34.
description: Medium-sized woodpecker (larger than Downy, smaller than flicker; about the size of Hairy), with finely barred black and gray upperparts, gray underparts, pale red wash on lower belly, gray head with bright red nape and hind-crown, pale red rictal tuft above a straight black bill; bill about an inch long; tail and rump mottled black and white.Behaviors: Climbing on tree trunksCall: call a repeated "chuck"Plumage: adult
photographer: Photographer: N Komar, N Komar, N Komar, N Komar
